name: Romesh Wadhwani
profileSummary: Romesh Tekchand Wadhwani is an Indian-American billionaire, businessman and head of investment firm SAIGroup. He is the former chairman and CEO of Symphony Technology Group, a private equity firm for software, Internet and technology services companies, including SurveyMonkey and Onclusive. He established the Wadhwani Foundation for economic development in emerging economies, with an initial focus on India.
